allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Autoritativo GoDaddy \(ns21\) ==="; Resolve-DnsName getsmcaf.com -Type A -Server ns21.domaincontrol.com -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Type -eq 'A'} | Select-Object Name, IPAddress; Write-Output "=== Google DNS \(8.8.8.8\) ==="; Resolve-DnsName getsmcaf.com -Type A -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Type -eq 'A'} | Select-Object Name, IPAddress; Write-Output "=== www CNAME \(autoritativo\) ==="; Resolve-DnsName www.getsmcaf.com -Type CNAME -Server ns21.domaincontrol.com -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Type -eq 'CNAME'} | Select-Object Name, NameHost)

PowerShell($ts = Get-Date -Format "HH:mm:ss"; Write-Output "Hora: $ts"; Write-Output "=== Autoritativo GoDaddy \(ns21\) ==="; Resolve-DnsName getsmcaf.com -Type A -Server ns21.domaincontrol.com -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Type -eq 'A'} | Select-Object Name, IPAddress)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== getsmcaf.com \(A\) ==="; Resolve-DnsName getsmcaf.com -Type A -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Type -eq 'A'} | Select-Object Name, IPAddress; Write-Output "=== www \(CNAME\) ==="; Resolve-DnsName www.getsmcaf.com -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Type, NameHost)
